Class Vampire

java.lang.Object
logic.entity.Character
logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
All Implemented Interfaces:
Attackable, AttackAnimation, Damageable, HaveWeapon, OwnWeaponPos
public class Vampire extends HybridClass implements HaveWeapon, OwnWeaponPos
Vampire hybrid melee character with life-steal mechanics.
